name: Auga Group AB
summary: Auga Group AB, together with its subsidiaries, operates an organic food production company in Lithuania. It operates through Crop-Growing, Mushroom Growing, Dairy, and End-Consumer Packaged Goods segments. The company is involved in the mushroom growing; organic milk production, and cattle raising and sale activities; and growing of various crops such as organic wheat, legumes, rapeseed, sugar beets, oat, and barley as well as other crops, including grasses and corn for feed. It also offers ready-to-eat soups, preserved mushrooms, packaged vegetables, bottled milk, milk-shakes, eggs, poultry, flour, and other products. The company provides human resource management, trade and logistics, IT system development, machinery leasing, land rental, and agricultural services. The company manages approximately 39,000 hectares of organically certified arable land, as well as uses proprietary and contracted manufacturing to produce a range of organic food products for the end consumer, as well as organic commodities purchasers. It also exports its products to Scandinavian and Baltic countries, Poland, Germany, and France, as well as in the United States, the United Arab Emirates, and Japan. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Vilnius, Lithuania. Auga Group AB is a subsidiary of Baltic Champs Group, UAB.
